Thought 3: I need to compare the two suspects. Both have motive and opportunity, but the key is the murder weapon and the circumstances. The shotgun was found on the plane, and the murder happened in the airplane bathroom. Roy was on the plane with Keira, awake and idle, and had direct access to the shotgun as a prop handler. He also had a strong emotional reaction to her infidelity, which he witnessed firsthand. Angela, while having a motive and potential access via unchecked suitcases, was not on the plane at the time of the murder—she was seen entering her house shortly after Keira was last seen at the party. The murder occurred during the flight, so Angela would not have been present. Roy was on the flight and had the means (gun handling skills, access to a shotgun prop) and opportunity (awake, idle, seated near Keira). Therefore, Roy is the more likely murderer.
